title: Clarify and fix admin panel login credentials

requirements.text: Inspect the backend verifyAdminPassword function to confirm the hardcoded admin password, then update the Admin login page to remove any username field (since authentication is password-only) and ensure the login form clearly labels the single 'Password' input. Display a helper hint on the login page indicating there is no username — only a password is required.

quotes: I am typing user name and password to sign in but it's saying invalid

acceptanceCriteria: The admin login form has only a password field — no username field is present.
A visible hint or label on the login page informs the user that only a password is needed.
The backend verifyAdminPassword function is called with the correct hardcoded password and returns true, allowing access.
Entering the correct password grants access to the admin dashboard.
Entering an incorrect password displays a clear error message.
The known issue 'Admin panel login credentials unclear to user' is resolved.

constraints: Do not change the existing admin authentication flow beyond fixing the credential mismatch.
Do not modify files in frontend/src/hooks/ or frontend/src/components/ui.
nonGoals: Integrating Internet Identity for admin login.
Changing any product management or CRUD functionality.
